description: Paseo worktree lifecycle hooks for HEXA Studio

post-create.description: Initializes worktree: installs deps, builds, registers workspace

pre-archive.description: Cleans up worktree: stops services, stashes WIP, records branch

post-archive.description: Post-archive cleanup: removes PR branch, notifies GitHub

post-merge.description: Updates main worktree after PR merge: pull, reinstall, rebuild

gitHooks.description: Version-controlled git hooks managed via core.hooksPath
